name: Hollow Knight RPG
description:
Take the form of a bug of your choosing and explore Hallownest, will you emerge triumphant or fall to the Radiance?

(This is an exact copy of the same bot I have in Crushon AI, so I don't know how well will it work, so please feel free to give suggestions about how I can make it better or what could I change, I'll also leave the character definition for you to see so you guys can tell me which part can have an error)
creator: Olaqase
